_note: Offchain-only Switchboard feed map for Adrena tokens that are NOT registered in the on-chain oracle account and NOT tied to any adrena_feed_id slot. These prices are consumed by adrena-data (cron/process/processAdxTokenPrice.ts, cron/process/processLpTokenPrice.ts) for database/analytics pricing (ADX governance token, ALP LP token spot value) and are never submitted to the Adrena program via update_oracle. Separated from switchboard.mainnet.json to prevent schema confusion: switchboard.mainnet.json entries carry `adrena_feed_id` and drive on-chain oracle state; entries here are pure symbol→hash lookups for offchain pricing. Consumers should use the embedded hash as the primary pricing attempt, falling back to any legacy hardcoded feed or on-chain simulation paths for liveness. Queue A43DyUGA7s8eXPxqEjJY6EBu1KKbNgfxF8h17VAHn13w is the on-demand mainnet default.

feed_map._description: Adrena governance token (ADX) mainnet on-demand feed.
Adrena LP token (ALP) mainnet on-demand feed. Spot-price view of ALP; offchain consumers should still fall back to on-chain get_lp_token_price simulation when this feed is unavailable.
